# MuleSoft Retail

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (3.2) of Retail documentation.
> See [Retail llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/retail/llms-full.txt) for all the Retail documentation in one file.

## Content

- [B2C Setup Guide](https://docs.mulesoft.com/retail/latest/b2c-setup-guide.md)
- [Object Mappings](https://docs.mulesoft.com/retail/latest/cim-mappings.md)
- [MuleSoft Accelerator for Retail](https://docs.mulesoft.com/retail/latest/index.md)
- [OFBiz Setup and Configuration](https://docs.mulesoft.com/retail/latest/ofbiz-setup-config.md)
- [Prerequisites for MuleSoft Accelerator for Retail](https://docs.mulesoft.com/retail/latest/prerequisites.md)
- [Accelerator Setup Guide](https://docs.mulesoft.com/retail/latest/rcg-setup-guide.md)
- [Salesforce Customization Guide](https://docs.mulesoft.com/retail/latest/rcg-sfdc-customization-guide.md)
- [SAP Custom BAPI Setup Guide](https://docs.mulesoft.com/retail/latest/sap-custom-bapi-setup-guide.md)
- [SAP S4HANA Setup Guide](https://docs.mulesoft.com/retail/latest/sap-s4hana-setup-guide.md)
- [Deliver Personlization Use Case Setup Guide](https://docs.mulesoft.com/retail/latest/sfdc-data-cloud-setup-guide.md)
